package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for error_string_comparison: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `if err.Error() == "some error"` string comparison for error checking
type CaseErrorStringComparisonDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseErrorStringComparisonModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseErrorStringComparisonRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseErrorStringComparisonModel
}

type CaseErrorStringComparisonService struct {
    repo *CaseErrorStringComparisonRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseErrorStringComparisonAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeErrorStringComparison(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseErrorStringComparisonDTO) error {
    focus := "error_string_comparison"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    error_string_comparison_negative := map[string]int{"error": 1, "string": 2, "comparison": 3}
    error_string_comparison_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    error_negative_0 := error_string_comparison_negative["error"] + len(input)
    _ = error_negative_0
    string_negative_1 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_negative_1
    comparison_negative_2 := error_string_comparison_negative["comparison"] + len(input)
    _ = comparison_negative_2
    return nil
}
